revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1700年代の書籍]] [[ar:Category:كتب عقد 1700]] [[ast:Category:Llibros de los años 1700]] [[commons:Category:1700s books]] [[cy:Category:Llyfrau'r 1700au]] [[eo:Category:Libroj aperintaj en 1700-1709]] [[es:Category:Libros de los años 1700]] [[fa:Category:کتاب‌های دهه ۱۷۰۰ (میلادی)]] [[fi:Category:1700-vuosikymmenen kirjat]] [[hy:Category:1700-ականների գրքեր]] [[ko:Category:1700년대 책]] [[pt:Category:Livros da década de 1700]] [[ro:Category:Cărți din anii 1700]] [[ru:Category:Книги 1700-х годов]] [[tr:Category:1700'ler kitapları]] [[ur:Category:1700ء کی دہائی کی کتابیں]] [[vi:Category:Sách thập niên 1700]] [[zh:Category:1700年代書籍]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Chikuzen no Kuni Zoku Fudoki]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8100789)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1700s_books here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
